prompt: The provided image shows a young woman standing full-length, photographed straight-on in a studio. She wears a vivid SCARLET RED cotton midi dress with a fine tonal pinstripe, thin straps, a shirred bodice and a full flowing skirt, with flat strappy sandals. Keep HER 100% identical and untouched - exact face, hair, skin tone, body, pose, arms, hands, and especially the scarlet red pinstripe dress and its precise colour. Do NOT alter, repaint, recolour, restyle, resize, sharpen or move any part of her or her dress. Treat her as a locked fixed foreground layer. Replace ONLY the plain studio backdrop behind and beneath her with a new scene, compositing her in completely unchanged and standing naturally grounded. New background: a FLAT aged plaster wall in soft sandy-ochre with subtle patina and faint dappled shadow from out-of-frame foliage; soft warm natural daylight. CRITICAL geometry: the new background MUST be a FLAT wall surface parallel to the camera, photographed straight-on at her eye level - NO receding perspective, NO converging diagonal lines, NO alley, terrace or floor stretching away at an angle. Show only a small strip of ground directly at her feet. The flat frontal wall must match her straight-on studio pose. REALISM: match the soft, even, frontal studio light exactly and wrap a little of it onto the wall; add a soft grounded contact shadow under her sandals; render the wall with real surface texture and a gentle shallow depth of field so it sits slightly soft behind her; add subtle natural photographic film grain so the whole frame reads as one real photograph, not a clean CGI render. Native 2:3 vertical portrait, photoreal editorial fashion photography, seamless realistic compositing, no text, no extra people, no florals near the dress.
